Indicative Pricing

Vegetarian menufrom ₹700/plate
Non-vegetarian menufrom ₹1,300/plate
Booking advance50%
Event slots9AM–3PM / 6PM–12AM

Prices exclude GST. Hall hire is bundled into the per-plate rate — no hidden venue fee.

Send an Enquiry

Or reach us directly: +91 89613 33313 · 11 AM – 8 PM, all days

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum guest count?

No strict minimum, but our model is per-plate so events from 150 guests upward are ideal. We accommodate up to 700+ floating guests.

Are outside caterers allowed?

Our in-house kitchen maintains quality. Outside catering is generally not permitted; outside decorators may be considered case-by-case.

How much advance is required?

50% of the estimated total confirms your date. Balance is due 3 days before the event. Dates are held only against payment.

What time slots are available?

Morning: 9 AM – 3 PM. Evening: 6 PM – 12 AM. Both available all days including weekends and public holidays.

Is Havan permitted?

Yes — at our Golaghata venue. Let us know in advance so we arrange proper ventilation and fire-safety protocols.

Can we visit before booking?

Absolutely. Call or WhatsApp +91 89613 33313 to schedule a visit between 11 AM and 6 PM any day.

What about date rescheduling?

Date changes are adjustable subject to availability. Contact us at least 30 days before your original event date.

Is alcohol permitted?

In-house alcohol service is not available. External arrangements may be permissible depending on the venue — ask us at booking.
